rows.finalText: For "What is the next right step in my calling", the spread keeps returning to purpose / calling themes with a right path emphasis. Past opens with Sun (31), putting energy and confidence support forward movement in focus and setting the emotional weather around the reading. Sun colors your calling through confidence, visibility, success, and the warming effect of momentum that is finally obvious. In Present, Mountain (21) becomes the pivot, so an obstacle demands patient strategy turns into both pressure and opportunity. Here, Mountain emphasizes progress may be slower but still viable. What develops in Future through Stork (17) points to a healthy update is ready, provided the central pressure is handled honestly. Here, Stork emphasizes improvement, transition, upgrades, and the feeling that something is trying to move into a better form. What ties the vocational pattern together is the link between Sun (31) and Stork (17): a blend of success and change, asking you to use visibility responsibly while staying alert to constant switching without consolidation. Mountain (21) shows where the whole sequence either opens or tightens. Mountain often points to the obstacle, delay, and effort layer of the situation in your calling. Sun (31) with Stork (17) keep emphasizing a blend of success and change, asking you to use visibility responsibly while staying alert to constant switching without consolidation. Work in stages and re-route as needed so Stork (17) can land as lived experience rather than just possibility.
